news.t: Counterpoint Launches New A.I. Driven Counterpoint Quantitative Equity ETF (CPAI)

holdings.infoBox: CPAI is an equity ETF with a total of 51 individual holdings. The top holdings are Astera Labs stock at 5.39%, Micron Technology at 4.99%, Credo Technology Group Holding at 4.23%, T1 Energy at 3.22%, and Centene at 3.10%.

overview.description: The Counterpoint Quantitative Equity ETF (CPAI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking long-term capital appreciation through a quantitative, model-based approach to select US stocks of any market capitalization. CPAI was launched on Nov 28, 2023 and is issued by Counterpoint.

data.title: Counterpoint Launches New A.I. Driven Counterpoint Quantitative Equity ETF (CPAI)
data.text: SAN DIEGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Counterpoint Funds, a quantitative mutual fund and ETF provider specializing in systematic diversifier strategies, today announced the launch of the Counterpoint Quantitati...
